text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
414 
RELATIONSHIP_DESC 
LABEL: 
Relationship Description 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the description of the relationship between the Part D Contract and Plan ID that was 
active in in the reference year — and any associated Contract and Plan ID(s) in the previous year. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: RELATIONSHIP_DESC 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
15 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
New =
